title: Nichirin Katanas
description: Replaces vanilla swords with custom Nichirin katanas.
body:
## Features
- Replaces all vanilla swords
- Custom 3D item models
- No mods or OptiFine required
  <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/O3CuyrA_RtQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Version support
Minecraft Java Edition:
- 1.21.11
- 1.21.9-1.21.10

## Katana variants
- Wooden Sword — Training Katana
- Stone Sword — Tokito Muichiro Katana
- Copper Sword — Zenitsu Agatsuma Katana
- Iron Sword — Sanemi Shinazugawa Katana
- Gold Sword — Kyojuro Rengoku Katana
- Diamond Sword — Giyu Tomioka Katana
- Netherite Sword — Yoriichi Tsugikuni Katana

## Installation
1. Download the release for your Minecraft version
2. Put the `.zip` into `.minecraft/resourcepacks` (do not extract)
3. Enable it in **Options → Resource Packs**

## Permissions
All Rights Reserved.

Allowed:
- Use in videos/streams (including monetized content)
- Personal/private edits for your own use (no publishing)

Not allowed (without explicit permission):
- Reupload or redistribute
- Include in modpacks/collections
- Reuse assets in other projects
- Publish modified versions
- Sell the pack/assets or lock it behind paid access
